title: Sunrise at Big Red: A 4AM Adventure
body:
We left Dubai at 3:30 AM. The city lights faded in the rearview mirror and stars appeared one by one as we drove south on the Al Qudra road. By the time we reached Big Red, the horizon was beginning to glow a deep copper...

Deflating tyres to 18 PSI, we began the climb. The Defender's front wheels bit into the soft sand and we crested the first ridge just as the sun broke over the horizon. Pure magic.
